design_philosophy: Cinematic, music-led, emotion-driven storytelling. Premium luxury feel. No corporate elements, no generic 'SaaS' styles, no purple/violet gradients. Focus on deep contrasts, soft glowing neon highlights, glassmorphism audio players, and waveform aesthetics.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-tight
scales.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-snug
scales.label: text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-zinc-500

hero_bg.description: Abstract audio waveform for hero background overlay

artist_portrait.description: Moody, cinematic portrait of the artist standing in the dark

studio_vibe.description: Artist singing into microphone in studio, for How it Works section

sections.name: Hero
sections.instructions: Full-height (min-h-screen). Absolute positioned background image 'hero_bg' with heavy black overlay (`bg-black/60`). Center the text using Flexbox. H1 must be massive (`text-5xl md:text-7xl+`) using Clash Display. Subheadline in Manrope. CTA: Primary button is 'glowing_button' for WhatsApp, secondary is 'glass_card' pill for Listen to Songs. Include an animated waveform SVG at the bottom or behind the text.

sections.name: Social Proof
sections.instructions: A subtle, dark strip separating the hero from content. Text: '150+ SONGS CREATED SINCE 2025' combined with 5-star ratings or simple elegant icons. Use extremely wide tracking (`tracking-[0.3em]`) and muted color (`text-zinc-500`).

sections.name: About the Artist
sections.instructions: Grid layout. Left side: The 'artist_portrait' image, taking full height, rounded-2xl, grayscale with gold tint overlay on hover. Right side: Large typography, deep storytelling. Use 'text-3xl' for the quote. Include a subtle signature or script font accent if possible.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.instructions: 4 steps. Do not use standard 1-2-3-4 circles. Use a vertical glowing line (tracing beam effect) on desktop, connecting 4 glassmorphism cards. Steps: 1. Share Your Story, 2. Choose the Vibe, 3. The Studio Magic, 4. Your Song Arrives. Add subtle neon gold accents on active state.

sections.name: Audio Portfolio
sections.instructions: Showcase 6 song cards. Grid: 1 col on mobile, 2 cols on tablet, 3 cols on desktop. Card design: Glassmorphism (`bg-white/5 border-white/10`). Inside: Song cover image (use 'song_covers' array, small square like a vinyl cover, rounded-lg), Title, Occasion label. Custom UI: Add a play button and a faux waveform line (SVG or divs) that animates (pulses) when 'playing'. Only one should play at a time. Connect to pixabay audio samples.

sections.name: Value Proposition
sections.instructions: 5 benefits of a personalized song. Use Mode A: Tetris Grid. The main benefit spans 2 cols/2 rows. Use Phosphor or Lucide icons with a gold glow. Keep background transparent but borders subtle. Benefits: Immortalize Memories, Perfect Gifting, High Studio Quality, 100% Custom Lyrics, Emotional Impact.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.instructions: Cards with glassmorphism. Include quotes. Give them varying heights if using masonry, or a smooth sliding carousel. Emphasize the emotional reaction of the recipients ('She cried when she heard it').

sections.name: Pricing
sections.instructions: 3 packages: Basic, Premium, Studio-Quality. High contrast. The 'Premium' package should stand out with a 1px gold border and a subtle gold inner glow. Use the WhatsApp button as the CTA for all 3 ('Inquire via WhatsApp').

sections.name: FAQ
sections.instructions: Shadcn accordion. Override the default white background to transparent or `bg-white/5`. Text should be high-contrast white.

sections.name: Final CTA
sections.instructions: Use 'studio_vibe' background image with `bg-black/80` overlay. Massive text: 'Ready to write your story in sound?'. Large glowing WhatsApp button.

sections.name: Floating WhatsApp CTA
sections.instructions: Fixed bottom right. A circular button with WhatsApp icon, pulsing green or gold glow. `z-50`.

technical_requirements.animations: Use framer-motion for scroll reveals (fade up, slow ease-out). Use CSS for pulsing glows and waveform bars. Do not overuse parallax on mobile.
technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='whatsapp-cta-hero'`).
